case_title: SABERMAN, MICHAEL VS SOFT/VIEW COMPUTER PRODUCTS INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,508.79 FILED BY SABERMAN, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT SOFT/VIEW COMPUTER PRODUCTS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-16-1994, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO MAR-31-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SABERMAN, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOFT/VIEW COMPUTER PRODUCTS INC. $3,508.79 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,528.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SOFT/VIEW COMPUTER PRODUCTS INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUL-15-1994, DENIED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SOFT/VIEW COMPUTER PRODUCTS INC. HEARING SET FOR JUL-15-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $3,589.77 AS TO DEFENDANT SOFT/VIEW COMPUTER PRODUCTS INC.
CERTIFIED MAIL TO DEF.JOHN DENNIS RETURNED SIGNED.
